creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
The history is here:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/net-im/jitsi/Makefile?view=log&pathrev=534092

In r526743:

BROKEN=         fails to start, missing requirement osgi.native

In r526075:

Remove MAINTAINER, whose email is no longer valid.

In r516887:

BROKEN=         unfetchable

So old version was unfetchable for a long time, new version (already three years old) never worked and there was no longer a maintainer!

I guess you can checkout the port and test/fix it.
